home.subtitle: Thetha indawo nganye yobomi bakho - fumana amanqaku akho okulungelelaniswa

dashboard.title: Imbali yokuJonga i-Algorithm yokuJonga
dashboard.subtitle: Landela inkqubela yakho ekuhambeni kwexesha
dashboard.tryWiderRange: Zama uluhlu olubanzi okanye khetha ixesha elahlukileyo.
dashboard.completeFirst: Gqibezela uvavanyo lwakho lokuqala ukuze ubone inkqubela yakho kunye neendlela apha.

focusAreas.title: Iindawo ekugxilwe kuzo
focusAreas.subtitle: Iindidi zakho ezi-3 zamanqaku asezantsi - ukuphucula ezi kuqhuba ezona nzuzo zikhulu.
focusAreas.empty: Gqibezela iiseshini ezingakumbi ukuze ubone izindululo zojoliso lomntu ngamnye.

settings.title: Izicwangciso ze-App
settings.saveLastSessionDesc: Gcwalisa kwangaphambili iimpendulo kwiseshini yakho yakutshanje egqitywe.
settings.resetProgressDesc: Cima zonke iimpendulo ezigciniweyo kwaye uqale ngokutsha.
settings.targetScoreDesc: Seta amanqaku (1,000–10,000) ukujonga inkqubela yakho kwideshibhodi.
settings.clearConfirmMessage: Oku kuya kuzicima umphelo zonke iimpendulo zakho zangoku kwaye akunakuphinda kungenziwa.
settings.goalErrorRange: Nceda ufake amanqaku phakathi kwe-1,000 kunye ne-10,000.

questionnaire.resetMessage: Oku kuya kucima yonke impendulo kwaye kuqale ukusuka ekuqaleni. Oku akunakwenziwa kwakhona.

submitHint.zero: 0 of {total} imibuzo ephendulweyo — imibuzo engaphendulwanga yomisela ubuncinane
submitHint.partial: {remaining} umbuzo oseleyo — imibuzo engaphendulekiyo emincinci ukuya kubuncinane | {remaining} imibuzo eshiyekileyo — imibuzo engaphendulekiyo yomisela ubuncinane

submitTitle.zero: Phendula imibuzo ukuze ugqibezele uvavanyo lwakho

onboarding.step0Body1: Esi sixhobo sikunceda ukuba ulinganise indlela elungelelaniswe ngayo ingqondo yakho, imikhwa, kunye nezenzo zemihla ngemihla kunye nokufezekisa iinjongo zakho. Phendula umbuzo ngamnye ngokunyaniseka ukuze ufumane amanqaku akho angoku.
onboarding.step0Body2: Gcwalisa uluhlu lwemibuzo ngamaxesha aqhelekileyo ukulandelela ukukhula kwakho ekuhambeni kwexesha kwaye ubone ukuba zeziphi iindawo ezifuna ukuqwalaselwa kakhulu.
onboarding.step1Body: Umbuzo ngamnye uxabisa inani elithile lamanqaku. Zilinganisele kwisikali se- 1–10 kumbuzo ngamnye. Ireyithingi ye-10 ithetha ukuba uwubandakanya ngokupheleleyo lo mgaqo; I-1 ithetha ukuba awukaqali.
onboarding.step2Body1: Zonke iimpendulo zakho kunye nembali yamanqaku zigcinwe ekuhlaleni kwisixhobo sakho usebenzisa idatabase efihliweyo yeSQLite. Akukho nto ithunyelwa kuyo nayiphi na iseva ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacileyo.
onboarding.step2Body2: Inqaku elikhethiweyo lokwabelana koontanga likuvumela ukuba ubone amanqaku adityanisiweyo angaziwa kwabanye abasebenzisi. Yabelana kuphela ngesishwankathelo esisayiniweyo ngokufihlakeleyo - ayisokuze iphendule umntu ngamnye.
onboarding.readyText: Ngaba ulungile? Masifumane amanqaku akho asisiseko.

sharing.title: Ukwabelana ngokungaziwa kweNethiwekhi
sharing.description: Ngokuzithandela unikele iziphumo zakho ngokungaziwa kwinethiwekhi yehlabathi. Akukho gama, i-imeyile, idilesi ye-IP, okanye i-ID yesixhobo esakhe kwabelwana ngaso.
sharing.activeBadge: ✓ Amanqaku akho ongachazwanga kwabelwana ngawo noontanga
sharing.enableNote: Yenza ukuba ubone umgangatho wakho wepesenti xa uthelekiswa nenethiwekhi yehlabathi.

resume.historicalBody: Iimpendulo zakho kwiseshini yakho yokugqibela zilayishwe kwangaphambili. Ngaba ungathanda ukugcina loo maxabiso njengesiqalo, okanye uqale ngekhweshine engenanto ngokupheleleyo?
resume.activeBody: Uneseshoni eqhubekayo. Ngaba ungathanda ukuqalisa apho uyeke khona, okanye uqale uvavanyo olutsha?
resume.clearWarning: ⚠️ Oku kuya kucima zonke iimpendulo zangoku. Ingaba uqinisekile?

update.releaseNotesFallback: Ndwendwela iphepha lokukhutshwa ukuze ukhuphele inguqulelo yamva nje.
